judge.focus: Synthesize panel outputs into accepted actions, rejected risks, and next gates.

panels.focus: Map source evidence into system architecture and integration points.
Find false assumptions, missing gates, and showpiece credibility risks.
Turn findings into executable tasks, tests, and receipts.

review_gates.check: Do not mutate source repos unless explicitly approved.
review_gates.name: source-evidence boundary

review_gates.check: Architect, skeptic, and operator outputs must be synthesized before action.
review_gates.name: council synthesis

review_gates.check: Evaluator replacement decisions occur only at epoch boundaries.
review_gates.name: rqgm evaluator checkpoint

review_gates.check: Tests, smoke commands, and CAM checks are recorded before claims.
review_gates.name: verification receipts

roles.why: Owns orchestration, code changes, verification, and final decisions.
Challenges assumptions, identifies blind spots, and reviews reasoning.
Reviews implementation quality, safety, maintainability, and docs.
Synthesizes large source evidence and checks cross-document coherence.
Matches swarm-code's bring-your-own OpenAI-compatible endpoint model.
